svg.title: Middleware fan-out data flow topology
svg.desc: Sensors transmit Parquet payloads with HMAC integrity to a middleware ingress gateway. The ingress verifies integrity and publishes to an internal JetStream bus. Configurable destination workers consume independently and forward to Nexus, Splunk, Elastic, or SQL Server.

g.text: TLS termination · bearer auth · integrity verification · cross-schema validation
